<!--
Thanks for sending a patch. Keep this short; delete sections that do not apply.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for what lands easily and what needs an issue first.
This is a fork of vincentkoc/tokenjuice. If your change is not fork-specific,
consider offering it upstream too.
-->

## What and why

<!-- One or two sentences on the user-visible change and the problem it solves. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New rule / reducer
- [ ] New or changed host integration (opened an issue first per CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor with no command-surface change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm verify` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests / fixtures covering the change
- [ ] Updated the `Unreleased` section of `CHANGELOG.md` for any user-visible effect
- [ ] No personal details, hostnames, real private IPs, account names, tokens, or unredacted absolute paths in code, rules, docs, tests, or this PR (use 192.0.2.x for example IPs)
- [ ] Conventional commit messages, no AI co-authorship trailers
- [ ] Considered whether this change should also be offered upstream (vincentkoc/tokenjuice)
